title: Lighting device for vehicle with optical axis adjustment
abstract: The present invention pertains to optical axis adjustment system for a lighting device (100) of an automotive vehicle. The lighting device (100) is provided with housing (10), a first holding member (14) and a second holding member (16) moulded on the housing (10) of the lighting device (100). An optical axis adjustment system is provided with a manual adjuster (20) and an aiming module (22) rotatable and supported on the housing (10). The aiming module (22) consists of a two ends namely far end (A) and a near end (B) and guiding member for guiding the aiming module (22) on the housing (10). Additionally, the aiming module consists of a plurality of recesses (22a, 22b) extending along the length of the aiming module (22) and is flexible and rotatable along its longitudinal axis. The aiming module (22) is also provided with an attaching element (24a) with a male element (26) at the far end (A) and an attaching element (24b) and a recess element (28) at the near end (B) of the aiming module (22).
claims: Claims [Revendication 1] [A lighting device (100) for an automobile comprising: a) a housing (10); b) at least one first holding member (14) and at least one second holding member (16); and c) an optical axis adjustment system for adjusting the optical axis of the lighting device, the optical axis adjustment system having i. at least one adjuster (20); ii. at least one flexible aiming module (22) rotatable and supported on the housing (10), the aiming module (22) comprising a far end (A) and a near end (B); and iii. at least one guiding member for guiding the aiming module (22) on the housing (10) [Revendication 2] The lighting device as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the at least one aiming module (22) consists of a plurality of recesses (22a, 22b) extending along the length of the aiming module (22). [Revendication 3] The lighting device as claimed in any of the claim 1 to 2, wherein the at least one aiming module (22) is flexible and rotatable along its longitudinal axis. [Revendication 4] The lighting device as claimed in claim 1 to 3, wherein the at least one aiming module (22) comprises an attaching elements (24a) and a male element (26) at the far end (A) of aiming module (22). [Revendication 5] The lighting device as claimed in claim 4, wherein the male element (26) of the at least one aiming module (22) is engageable into the manual adjuster (20) of the optical axis adjustment system. [Revendication 6] The lighting device as claimed in claim 1 to 5, wherein the at least one aiming module (22) comprises an attaching elements (24b) and a recess element (28) at the near end (B) of aiming module (22). [Revendication 7] The lighting device as claimed in claim 6, wherein the recess element (28) of the at least one aiming module (22) is accessible from outside the housing (10) to perform optical axis adjustment of the lighting device. [Revendication 8] The lighting device as claimed in claim 2 and 3, wherein the plurality of recesses (22a, 22b) of the at least one aiming module (22) are arranged by rotating adjacent recess to create 90 Q angle between the recess along the longitudinal axis. [Revendication 9] The lighting device as claimed in any of the preceding claims, wherein the at least one first holding member (14) and at least one second holding member (16) are moulded on the housing (10) of the lighting device. [Revendication 10] The lighting device as claimed in any of the preceding claims, wherein a retaining bracket (5) is attached to housing to retain the at least one aiming module (22) in place. [Revendication 11] The lighting device as claimed in any of the preceding claims, wherein the aiming module is made by injection moulding. J
